pi_items.source: Verified from export_result.sh which parses prefs.js to explicitly check for an address book created with the description 'External Vendors'.
Verified against setup_task.sh which explicitly inserts exactly these 3 external emails into the Thunderbird SQLite abook.sqlite database during environment setup.
Verified against setup_task.sh which explicitly inserts exactly these 9 internal Enron emails into the Thunderbird SQLite abook.sqlite database during environment setup.

privileged_info_summary: The task environment initializes a Thunderbird abook.sqlite database via a Python script containing exactly 12 Enron-related contacts. This includes 9 internal contacts (e.g., kenneth.lay@enron.com) and 3 external vendor targets (j.kaminski@yahoo.com, vkaminski@aol.com, shirley.crenshaw@wcom.com) which perfectly matches the metadata claims. The export_result.sh evaluation script properly tracks and parses prefs.js to check that a new target address book is named exactly 'External Vendors'.
